meta.name: ABILITY_TELEKINESIS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles.
Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles with Chain Knockback.

meta.name: ABILITY_SUGGESTION_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Cause an enemy within your line of sight to attack another enemy if it can.
Cause enemies in a target area within your line of sight to each attack another enemy if they can.

meta.name: ABILITY_MINDCONTROL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Charm an enemy within your line of sight for the rest of the battle.
Charm an enemy within your line of sight for the rest of the battle. That unit immediately takes an extra turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_MEGAGRAV_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Damage and throw each unit near you to random tiles.
Damage and throw each unit in a target area to random tiles.

meta.name: ABILITY_PSYFLUTTER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport exactly three tiles away.

Teleport exactly three tiles away.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_MAGNETPULL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Pull units toward a tile within range 5.
Pull units in a larger area toward a tile at infinite range.

meta.name: ABILITY_MINDBLAST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Push away each unit near you. This inflicts Madness and has a small chance to inflict Stun.
Push away each unit near a target area. This inflicts Madness and has a small chance to inflict Stun.

meta.name: ABILITY_PSYCHICCHOKE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal damage to and inflict Bruise on a unit within your line of sight.
Deal damage to and inflict Bruise on a unit within your line of sight. This damage counts as physical damage and scales with [img:str].

meta.name: ABILITY_SKYSHATTER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Create floating glass shards on a tile within your line of sight.
Create floating glass shards in an area within your line of sight.

meta.name: ABILITY_SUPERNOVA_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal damage to and inflict Blind on every unit within your line of sight.
Deal damage to and inflict Blind on every unit within your line of sight, excluding your allies.

meta.name: ABILITY_READMIND_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Replace your spells with the spells of an ally cat until the end of the turn.
Replace your spells with upgraded versions of the spells of an ally cat until the end of the turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_ALTERDNA_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 3 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.
Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 2 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.

meta.name: ABILITY_FLICKER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into.
Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into and inflict them with Confusion 2 and Blind 2.

meta.name: ABILITY_MINDMELD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Give another unit an extra turn after this one.
This spell can't be cast during extra turns.

Give another unit +10 mana and an extra turn after this one.
This spell can't be cast during extra turns.

meta.name: ABILITY_VACUUM_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport all enemies within an area as close to the center of that area as possible.
Teleport all enemies within a large area as close to the center of that area as possible and inflict Confusion on those units.

meta.name: ABILITY_GROWHEAD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +1 [img:int] and -1 [img:cha].

meta.name: ABILITY_PING_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Deal 1 damage to any unit within your line of sight.
RELOAD: Spend mana

Deal 1 damage to any unit within your line of sight.
RELOAD: Spend mana
Bonus Passive: +2 [img:int].

meta.name: ABILITY_FLASHFORWARD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into.

Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_FLASHBACK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport back.

meta.name: ABILITY_ORDER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Force a unit within your line of sight to move and attack one of its enemies.
Give a unit within your line of sight All Stats Up and force it to move and attack one of its enemies.

meta.name: ABILITY_TEMPORALSHARDS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_TEMPORALSHARDS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn. If its was an ally, the bleed thorns last for the rest of the battle.

meta.name: ABILITY_REALITYSCRAMBLE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Randomize the positions of all units. Enemies get Confused.
Randomize the positions of all units. Enemies get Confused. Non-boss enemies have a 10% chance to be erased from existence.

meta.name: ABILITY_GLARE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Madness on a unit in your line of sight.
Inflict Madness and Confusion on a unit in your line of sight.

meta.name: ABILITY_BLINDINGFLASH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit near you in your line of sight.
Inflict Blind 2 on each enemy within five tiles of you in your line of sight.

meta.name: ABILITY_SNATCH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Collect any pickup within your line of sight.

Collect any pickup within your line of sight.
Gain +1 [img:lck].

meta.name: ABILITY_FUTURESIGHT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A unit within your line of sight backflips out of the way the next time they're targeted by an enemy.

A unit within your line of sight backflips out of the way the next time they're targeted by an enemy.
 [s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_MASSMANALEECH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Mana Leech 2 and Weakness 2 on all units within 3 tiles of you.
Inflict Mana Leech 2 and Weakness 2 on all units within 5 tiles of you.

meta.name: ABILITY_BECOMEENTROPY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals damage and inflicts Stun instead.
Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals massive damage and inflicts Stun instead.

meta.name: ABILITY_FASTFORWARD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. You go first next round.
Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. Those units get +4 temporary [img:spd]. You go first next round.

meta.name: ABILITY_ANCESTRALRECALL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Upgrade one of your spells at random for the rest of the battle.
Target yourself or a unit within your line of sight and upgrade one of their spells at random for the rest of the battle.

meta.name: ABILITY_CUMULATIVEBLAST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal damage to a unit in your line of sight, then increase this spell's damage by 1 for the rest of the battle.

Deal damage to a unit in your line of sight, then increase this spell's damage by 1 for the rest of the battle.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_HALLUCINATE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn a friendly illusion of a random unit that fades away after one turn.
Spawn a friendly illusion of a random unit that fades away after one turn. The illusion gets +4 [img:spd] and +2 Damage.

meta.name: ABILITY_MASSHYSTERIA_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Every enemy in your line of sight takes an extra turn. They are charmed on that turn.

Every enemy in your line of sight takes an extra turn. They are charmed on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_EXTRATURNQ_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Take an extra turn. You're stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

Take an extra turn. You have a 75% chance to be stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_MINDCRACK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Magic Weakness 2 on all units in your line of sight.
Inflict Magic Weakness 2 and Confusion 1 on all non-allied units in your line of sight.

meta.name: ABILITY_RESET_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects.
[s:.7](This spell can be cast only once per battle.)[/s]

Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects.
Castable while you're downed. It costs 0 mana if you're downed.
[s:.7](This spell can be cast only once per battle.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_MIMIC_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Target an allied cat within your line of sight. Cast one of their spells at random for free (or use their basic attack if theres no good spells).

Target an allied cat within your line of sight. Cast one of their spells at random for free (or use their basic attack if theres no good spells).
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_CHAOSSWAP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Swap positions with a random unit.
Swap positions with a random unit. If that unit was an enemy, you inflict Confusion on it.

meta.name: ABILITY_ASTEROID_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Make an asteroid fall onto a tile within your line of sight. The asteroid deals damage and leaves a rock.
Make an asteroid fall onto a tile within your line of sight. The asteroid deals damage, bruises and leaves a boulder.

meta.name: ABILITY_STASIS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Freeze on a unit within your line of sight.
Inflict Freeze 1, Blind 2, and Confusion 2 on a unit within your line of sight.

meta.name: ABILITY_PASS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Give a unit within your line of sight an extra turn immediately, then end your turn. 
Castable only if you haven't taken any actions this turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

Give a unit within your line of sight an extra turn immediately, then end your turn.
Castable only if you haven't taken any actions this turn other than your movement action.
[s:.7](This can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_THINKDEEP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Restore all of your mana and fall asleep.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Restore all of your mana and fall asleep.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_PUPPET_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Force an enemy within your line of sight to attack in the direction it's facing.
Force a unit within your line of sight to attack in the direction it's facing.

meta.name: ABILITY_LOOKAWAY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Every unit within your line of sight turns away from you.
Every unit within your line of sight turns away from you and is inflicted with Blind 1.

meta.name: ABILITY_GRAVITYBLAST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision.
Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision and get stunned.

meta.name: ABILITY_INCREASEGRAVITY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Slow 1 on a unit within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.
Inflict Slow 1 on each unit in an area around a tile within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.

meta.name: ABILITY_MANIFEST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport in a straight line into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.
Teleport into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.

meta.name: ABILITY_FLIP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 1 on that unit.
Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 2 and Magic Weakness 1 on that unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_WITHDRAW_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.

Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_GRAVITYWAVE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal damage with Knockback 4 and Chain Knockback in a cone.
Deal damage with Knockback 4, Chain Knockback and inflict Bruise 1 in a cone.

meta.name: ABILITY_INVERSION_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Swap positions with a unit in your line of sight.

Swap positions with a unit in your line of sight.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_ECHO_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability if it's empty.
Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability. Displace and damage any units on that tile.

meta.name: ABILITY_SLIPSTEAM_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Dash up to three tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.
Dash up to five tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.
